title: Connector Catalog
description: Curated catalog of 8-12 known MCP connectors shipped with Plan 71 v2.1. Consumed by SP14 wizard Beat 2 (multiselect) for role-based pre-checked recommendations and per-connector defaults. Top-level is an array of catalog entries.

id.description: Stable connector identifier; matches user-manifest.json#/connectors[].id slot.

display_name.description: Human-friendly name shown in wizard UI.

description.description: One-line what-this-connector-does for the wizard's catalog grid.

mcp_server_id.description: Anthropic-bundled MCP server id (e.g., 'claude_ai_Granola'), or null when only a community-MCP exists.

category.description: Single category for grid grouping + search filtering.

role_recommendations.description: Roles for which this connector is pre-checked in Beat 2 multiselect. Empty array = never pre-checked.

default_pipeline_template_id.description: Group D pipeline template id (e.g., 'granola-meetings' for T-12); null if no default pipeline ships in v2.1.

default_schedule.description: Cron-style schedule string (e.g., '0 6 * * *') OR the literal 'manual' (no auto-runs; user invokes on demand).

default_target_vault_path.description: Vault subdirectory where pulled data lands (e.g., 'Inbox/Meetings/' for Granola). Null when connector writes outside the vault.

failure_mode_catalog_ref.description: Reference to docs/connectors-schema.md failure-mode catalog. Default 'block-and-log' per R-43.

default_processor_skill.description: Skill that processes pulled data (e.g., 'meeting-processor' for Granola). Null when connector is read-only data source.
